intro: Complete the Streamer.bot connection first. StreamBridge cannot receive Ko-fi donations directly and never stores your Ko-fi verification token.

sections.title: 1. Before enabling
sections.description: Connect Ko-fi to Streamer.bot and import the intake action.
sections.notice: Required order: create the Ko-fi webhook on the Streamer.bot website, add that URL and verification token in Ko-fi, import the bundled Ko-fi Donations .sb package, then attach Integrations > Ko-Fi > Donation to THSV Addon - Ko-fi Donations - Intake. This add-on will not receive anything until all four steps are complete.

links.label: Open the official Streamer.bot Ko-fi setup guide

sections.title: 2. Connection and status
sections.description: Enable intake only after the prerequisite checklist is complete.

sections.title: 3. Supporter privacy
sections.description: Choose what a public alert may display. Private Ko-fi details always stay hidden.

sections.title: 4. Alerts and chat activity
sections.description: Presentation is configured in the core overlay pages.
sections.notice: Use Alerts > Ko-fi > Donation for the alert card, sound, duration, and preview. Use Chat Overlay > Chat events > Ko-fi for the optional activity message. Disabling the chat activity message does not disable the alert.

sections.title: 5. Delivery safety
sections.notice: Financial events require Ko-fi's stable messageId. Missing IDs are rejected instead of replaced. Accepted donations use the persisted outbox, retry backoff, dead-letter handling, and duplicate suppression. StreamBridge stores neither the Ko-fi verification token nor payment history.
